feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Audit of changes Previous Employers (Work Experience)
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to check who and when added/removed data from People Profile for the specific user -> Career -> Work Experience -> block "Previous Employers" created as Live Profile MDF Information?

I've run some Audit Reports but I don't see there data from this block. 

Thank you and regards,

Aneta Krysiak

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Future Hire /Current hire notification to manager
entry.content:
Team, 

Requirement is to trigger a custom notification on hire date of employee.

In EC if you add employee it is working fine,however when candidate is pushed from Manage pending hire to EC and submitted, no notification trigger

Business rule Screenshot is attached.- Rule is placed on Save alert under job info. base object Job information
Workflow screenshot is attached

Note form EC side working fine, From Manage pending hire if candidate comes it is not triggering email notification

Kindly help

entry.title: Reporting from Recruiting and Employee Central
entry.content:
We need a report that will pull requisition information (req ID, start date, etc) then also the employee ID and latest hire date from the person hired. When we have just information from recruiting we see this (the Employee ID is from the candidate data):

When we add latest hire date we get this:

Does anyone know how we can bring together this data in one report?

entry.title: Best Approach for Master Data Integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are planning to implement master data integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I would like to know the best approach for this integration. specifically

1. Should we use SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or SAP Master Data Integration (MDI) for this purpose?

2. Are there any additional recommended tools or services required to facilitate this integration

From My Research, I found that SAP MDI is often recommended for such integrations. also I found there are no standard Cost center and Organizational integration in SAP CPI for S4 HANA Public Cloud.

There is Standard I-flow for Employee Data Replication in SAP CPI but as per below post it should be used if our SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD is below 2308 Release. 

Link to the blog : Integrate SAP S4 HANA Cloud/on-premise with Succes... - SAP Community

However, I came across another blog that mentioned MDI is Moved to ABAP Adapter concept.

Link to the blog : Configuring the replication of Cost Centers from S... - SAP Community

Any insights, experiences, or updated information on this would be greatly appreciated,

Thankyou,

Anil

SAP Integration Suite  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Creating an L3-L8 Approval Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi,

We would like to add more management levels to our workflow approvals. However, with SuccessFactors not having an organizational hierarchy automatically saved, it's been difficult finding a way to expand our workflow approval list. I have looked into the option if using the Custom Manager in the Approver Type list, but I was only able to add one level. We currently created a dynamic role for our L2 leaders and this list is easy to maintain because it's a 1:1 relationship with employee assigned Function. Unfortunately, our L3-L8 doesn't have a 1:1 relationship with any employee attributes. 

Are there any other customers that have successfully built a workflow approval list of this type and if yes, does it require a lot of maintenance and how did you configure it?

Thanks in advance!
Annie

entry.title: Saving the event reason to a custom field
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is anyone saving their event reason to a custom field on job or comp info? I know that event reason derivation rules trigger after on save rules, so simply having a business rule look up the event reason to save to a custom field will return a null value.

entry.title: Time off workflow tile is not visible to one group appro with same permission in Manage workflow gro
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Time off workflow tile is not visible to one group approver with same permission in Manage workflow group.

There is workflow group and in that two users are there. Both users are getting all EC approvals, but one user is not able to see time off approval requests where other is able to both approval tiles.

 

Regards,

Jyoti

entry.title: Business rule for new hires and it is syncing from the third party ATS tool
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have third party ATS tool(ICIMS) new hires syncing to EC and we have written some business rule for new hires to auto populate the fields which are not coming from the ICIMS tool however it is working when we hire new employee manually in EC.

Please suggest how to assign business rule and what is the workaround.

Regards

ST

entry.title: Groovy issue
entry.content:
Hello experts

I am learning groovy to use it in Iflows configuration
I installed the GroovyConsole editor on my machine

I am testing with the next script

But when i run the script, the system is sending the next error:

unable to resolve class com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.message

Do you know how to solve this issue?

Thanks in advanced

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors as User Details Data Source in GRC Access Control
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I've a requirement to configure SAP SuccessFactors as User Search/Details Data Source in GRC Access Control. How can we do this?

Can we have a map fields from SF to AC in SPRO to pick data in AC fields as required? Also, SF has different entities like employee, department, etc. Can we map fields in AC from any entity? Are there any pre-requisites or additional settings/parameters required to perform this mapping?

Thanks,

Kaushal

entry.title: Contingent worker Multiple employment scenario
entry.content:
Dear team,

I have a question regarding the contingent worker solution in SuccessFactors. Is it possible for an employee in Employee Central to have a full job information record with an FTE of 50% and simultaneously have one or two contingent records?

I understand that an employee can have two contingent worker records with concurrent employment, but I am unsure if it is possible to have both an Employee Central record with full job information (FTE 50%) and one or two contingent worker records simultaneously. Can you clarify this?

entry.title: Is it possible to create a business rule for recurring payments that will trigger a workflow?
entry.content:
I need to create a rule that will trigger a workflow for recurring payments and if no scenario is catched raised an error message. 

I have already tried using cross-entity rules with spot bonus, compensation information and compensation models but with no luck.

Please help!

entry.title: Termination Error Active Employment
entry.content:
Hello,

When I go to approve a termination workflow, I receive the error "user must have an active employment record to be terminated."  When I close out of the error and look at the employees Job Info, it shows they are still active, and shows the termination was still approved.  Any idea why I get this error pop-up if the approval is still going through?

entry.title: Filtering Workflows based on Payrun A or Payrun B
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We are using SF EC and have two groups of employees for whom we run fortnightly payruns ie payrun A (01 July to 14 July) & B (08 July to 21 July). Can we filter workflows for payrun A employees (need to focus on coming due payrun) and also filter workflow for payrun B employees. 

Will highly appreciate help. 
Regards,

entry.title: Manager Detect cycle error Success factors
entry.content:
Dears,

Kindly note that when i make any manual entry in manager field is appearing that there manager detect cycle so please if any one faced this issue and another question are there any report that show employee with 3 up levels for direct managers 

Thanks

Amr Zen

entry.title: Unable to use Greek alphabet letters when entering Greek National ID information,
entry.content:
Not able to update Greece alphabets in Greece National ID Portlet.  Kindly help me if any has configured this. 

Thanks in advance..

entry.title: Can we permission the Self Description feature in Spotlight?
entry.content:
Good day, 

Can we consider making the Self Description feature in Spotlight manageable through RBP? SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Employee Profile  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 

Such an open text box for employees creates room for anything to be entered that can be in violation and controversial. 

Making the feature manageable through permissions will help companies deter any situations of controversy. 

Regards,

Sean

entry.title: How to add wt 1630 to box 11 of w2 in sap need help on this
Remove directDeposit in Manage Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

I need to remove HRIS element  directDeposit from Manage Business Configuration ,. I followed KBA- https://me.sap.com/notes/0003226847 . I removed the code from Succession Data model. But still its not working . It still shows in MBCUI

Please let me know as how this element can be removed.

entry.title: Two new hire data in position after moving the candidate from MPH to EC
entry.content:
Hello all , 

 

When a candidate move from onboarding manage pending hire to EC with few changes in position and hire date in MPH , after moved to EC noticed that having a two new hire event in position with one empty data and changed data.

please do let me know possible way to avoid this issue?

Thanks and regards,

Dhanush Kumar
